## My first leptos app

here:

<iframe
  src="/apps/hallo-leptos/index.html"
  width="100%"
  height="300"
  style="border: none;">
</iframe>

<!--
![](apps/hallo-leptos/index.html){width="100%" height="600px"}
-->

testing again

[Open app](/apps/hallo-leptos/index.html)

<iframe
  src="about:blank"
  width="100%"
  height="300"
  style="border:5px solid red;">
</iframe>
